name: Jiangsu Linyang Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Linyang Energy Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies electronic energy meters and electricity management information systems worldwide. The company offers conventional meters, AMR meters, AMI smart meters, prepayment meters, C&I meters, balance meters, data concentrators, meter boxes, communication modules, and software products. It also provides indoor and outdoor LED lighting products, and intelligent control systems. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Linyang Electronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Linyang Energy Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Jiangsu Linyang Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Qidong, China.
